title: 9 Herbal Tinctures For Puffy Eyes
description: Aloe barbadensis tinctures contains bioactive constituents like aloin, aloe-emodin, and aloe-annone, which have anti-inflammatory properties. These compounds help reduce swelling by inhibiting the production of pro-inflammatory enzymes. Aloe-emodin also has a vasoconstrictive effect, which means it can narrow blood vessels and decrease fluid accumulation under the eyes.
